title: What is the Eva cockpit called
display_title: What is the Eva cockpit called
wikitext:
[]: What is the Eva cockpit called?             Quote Post by kevinlowl » Fri Nov 02, 2018 12:54 am The Eva cockpit with multiple screens inside that basically shows a 1:1 view of everything on the outside. The game Titanfall has a similar type of cockpit: https://titanfall.wikia.com/wiki/File:Titan_View.png What are they called? Is there a name for this?

[]: Re: What is the Eva cockpit called?             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Fri Nov 02, 2018 9:18 am Entry plug, cockpit, and very rarely, or informally, "throne of the soul". It's only mentioned once in episode 14 of the TV series, but I believe figures/models of the characters with the cockpit have used the name, and more recently, the VR ZONE SHINJUKU game "Evangelion VR The Throne of Souls : Berserk" has used it to specifically refer to the cockpit

[]: Re: What is the Eva cockpit called?             Quote Post by Joseki » Fri Nov 02, 2018 11:39 am Names from the 1.0 CRC: The whole thing is the "Entry Plug", the part where the pilot sit and control the Eva unit is called "Interior Array Inside Entry Plug", the 360° screen is called "Pilot's Display Inside Entry Plug".

It's only mentioned once in episode 14 of the TV series, but I believe figures/models of the characters with the cockpit have used the name, and more recently, the VR ZONE SHINJUKU game "Evangelion VR The Throne of Souls : Berserk" has used it to specifically refer to the cockpit
